So we were finally able to buy tickets BUT we were seated separately. It was fine though. The movie kept me entertained. Except for the guy near me who was snoring pretty loud, the movie was great.


Of course Robert Downey Jr was amazing as always. There might be

As the director said of the film "modern-day colonialism via sexual exploitation of a poor country's human resource".

Also, by far, the worst performance

With no friends in a strange land, Dre has nowhere to turn but maintenance man Mr. Han, who is a kung fu master. Only Jackie Chan could be saved from this movie.

Eisenberg was probably born for this role.

The story is well threaded and you don't get bored until the end. A decent movie.

Thematically it's as safe as houses, it

I think most people won't appreciate it until a couple of years from now.

Okay, the famous tank scene was perhaps a bit over the top but, what the hell, it’s supposed to be an action film with a touch of comedy so..

Great movie for a great and tough story.

Good photography and cut, the story is well developed and the performances are superb.

Also, it doesn't fail on being over dramatic. Just the perfect balance.

A must to be seen.

Flint accepts the invitation from his idol Chester V to join The Live Corp Company, which has been tasked to clean the island, and where the best inventors in the world create technologies for the betterment of mankind. first_review:
Much more effort involved than your typical "animated kid's movie sequel made in the 21st century". The story might not be quite as straightforward as the first _Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs_, but it ups the fantastical quality, making me appreciate it even more. Such a great hangover film.

_Final rating:★★★ - I liked it. Would personally recommend you give it a go._

Sadly, didn't end racism, but still very cute.

_Final rating:★★★ - I liked it. Would personally recommend you give it a go._

I've liked a decent amount Nick Park's work. I grew up on _Wallace & Grommit_ and _Chicken Run_ and enjoy them even now, but I think that maybe you have to like other things if you want to enjoy _Early Man_, things I personally, don't. 

_Final rating:★★ - Definitely not for me, but I sort of get the appeal_.

I was very young but little did I know that movie would change my life and put me on the path that I am now. Over the decades that have followed I have read the books and comics, played with the toys, played the video games, and eagerly watched any new film or television show related to the franchise.

first_review:
# Sharp, Simple, and Solid

«**마녀**» («**The Witch 1: The Subversion**») is a 2018 Korean film that sticks to what Korean storytelling does best—build around the human first, and then let the plot follow. It’s a familiar formula, but when done right, it works. And in this case, it definitely worked.

The opening was dark and brutal. A failed secret government experiment. Standard sci-fi setup.

This movie would make a GREAT survival horror game.

The movie itself was really good, it had solid acting and it didn't seem to rely on jump scares. The story was good and fleshed out and the things they didn't reveal, they explained in good time.
Not too gory and was a great balance of horror and story telling.

I would recommend this movie to anyone who likes story driven horror films.
